description: Phase D private-redeem validated live: the full private-bet-to-payout chain, with the redeem submitted through the committee-service relayer path (services/relayer.mjs relay() -> circom2soroban encode -> redeem_order_v2). Winners get a real profit, losers a refund, and the recipient is bound in the ZK proof so the relayer submits without seeing or signing for the position.
validated_by: services/committee/e2e-live-v2.mjs (redeem step routed through services/relayer.mjs relay())

live_result.lifecycle: place_order x4 -> encrypt_order proofs -> committee net (30,20) -> submit_batch_committee -> fund + resolve Yes -> claim_winnings (30 XLM) -> relayer redeems
live_result.winner_order_0: 10 YES, resolved YES -> bob +14.7499752 XLM (staked 10; ~4.75 profit at clearing price 0.525)

frontend.portfolio: web/app/app/portfolio + components/portfolio/positions-list.tsx render the local (browser) position book with a Claimable badge when the market is resolved
frontend.redeem_flow: web/lib/redeem/flow.ts: getProof -> proveRedeem (order_redeem_v2, in-browser) -> postRedeem to committee /redeem (relayer submits)
frontend.live_betting_market: web/lib/network.ts still points at the Phase C unresolved market CBKR2OYQ...; its orders become redeemable only after the committee batches + the market resolves (an operational step)

known_limitations: in-browser BLS12-381 redeem proving (~5k constraints) is faster than encrypt_order but still not instant
the redeem success link points at the pool explorer, not a per-tx link (the /redeem response has no tx hash field)
positions live only in the browser localStorage; losing the book loses the ability to redeem - the UI warns to back it up
